old_claim.note: Foraging & Botany provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim.note: Plant gathering and practical ecological knowledge are core parts of the forager subsistence pattern.

source_shape.source_locator: Definition section says foraged wild resources include gathering plants, collecting shellfish and small fauna, hunting, scavenging, and fishing; it also reports gathering as a major activity in sampled forager societies.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The source defines hunter-gatherers through foraging wild resources, explicitly including gathering plants and other food collection methods.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: The foraging_and_botany node covers identifying and gathering wild plants, so it is a direct component of the broad forager subsistence pattern rather than an unrelated background skill.

invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed: the foraging_and_botany edge remains enabling but now has source-backed review evidence and a more specific note.
would_reject_if: The hunting_gathering_basic node were narrowed to a hunting-only technique with no plant gathering component.
The foraging_and_botany node were narrowed away from wild-plant gathering and ecological identification.
A stronger source showed plant gathering was not part of the scoped forager subsistence pattern.
short_reason: Forager subsistence includes gathered wild plant foods.
